meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Advanced Client Workflows: Escape Basic App Development
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Master advanced client workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver enterprise-grade software at high velocity.
content.answer_block: To escape the 'basic app' trap, transition from manual coding to an AI-orchestrated workflow. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you force your output into a modular, production-ready state. This shift transforms you from a code-writer into a high-leverage software architect.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you land a client, you start coding, and suddenly you're trapped in a cycle of CRUD operations and boilerplate, churning out 'basic apps' that lack the polish and scalability of true professional software. Your development speed has hit a ceiling, and your client’s expectations are racing ahead of your manual output.

It is time to stop being a feature-factory and start being an architect. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-ticket consultant isn't the number of hours they log—it’s the leverage they command. By weaponizing Antigravity and Claude Code, you can automate the drudgery and focus your human intelligence on high-value system design.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the system's core constraints and schema before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean-architecture boilerplate for a production-grade SaaS, including separation of concerns between domain layer, data layer, and API gateway.

steps.title: Contextual Logic Injection
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your business requirements directly into the scaffolded architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing domain layer and suggest an optimized database schema for a multi-tenant user authentication system.

steps.title: Automated Testing Suites
steps.description: Never ship without validation; generate unit and integration tests automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a comprehensive test suite for the auth service, covering edge cases like session expiration and token refresh failures.

steps.title: Refactoring for Performance
steps.description: Identify bottlenecks and optimize the codebase for production load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for O(n^2) complexity bottlenecks and suggest vectorization or caching strategies.

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Automation
steps.description: Bridge the gap between local development and production environments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CI/CD configuration file for GitHub Actions that enforces linting, testing, and deployment to AWS.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'system-prompt.md' in your root directory to keep Claude Code aligned with your personal coding style and library preferences.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation as you code; it prevents the 'knowledge silo' effect when you hand projects over to clients.
Never accept the first output from an AI; force it to perform a self-critique pass before applying changes to the codebase.
Treat your CLI history as a project audit log—frequent commits via Claude Code allow for surgical rollbacks.
Modularize your prompts by feature; keep logic separated into small, manageable context files to prevent AI hallucinations.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is optimized, audit your current client projects. Identify the most repetitive module, apply this workflow to refactor it, and measure the reduction in your development time.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the methodology to stop being a basic coder and start being a high-leverage architect. Don't wait for your next client to demand more—build the capacity to deliver it today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
